Hospitality

CUD Auditorium

2024
Client Canadian University Dubai
Region Dubai, UAE
Year 2024
Sector Hospitality

Auditorium & Innovation Hub

Futuristic Auditorium & Training Hub

For Canadian University Dubai, a new auditorium and innovation hub was designed to serve as both the university’s formal ceremonial hall and a training ground for the next generation of marketers and brand builders. With a capacity of 200–300, the space embodies a futuristic, VIP atmosphere aligned with the university’s innovative spirit.
Next Project

Innovation Conference Hall
